title: More Smoker Variants
description: Smokers for every kind of wood and two more stone types
body:
[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/a-los-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/requires-quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) [![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/58vfg.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-furnace-variants-lieonlion) [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Smoker-Variants) [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) ## More Smoker Variants There is now a smoker variant every wood type and even the other basic stone types, namely **Blackstone1** and **Cobbled Deepslate1**. > ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/zs1b9.webp) > > **1**: _[More Furnace Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-furnace-variants-lieonlion)_ is required for the other stone types on all versions except for _1.21.4+**2**_.
Special2 recipe for Blackstone/Deepslate Smokers: Note: This is for versions without More Furnace Variants. ![](https://i.catgirl.host/i/10wri.gif) ### Example: Crimson Blackstone Smoker Instead of the furnace variant, you can use a regular furnace and fill the remaining four corner slots of the crafting grid with the relevant stone: Blackstone for Blackstone and Cobbled Deepslate for Deepslate.
### Adding 32 new _Smoker_ variants to Minecraft! --- ## Compatible with [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) 1.3.0+'s block replacement: ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/4tjpe.webp) Looking at the backyard of a Butcher's shop of a Savanna Village: We can see that instead of an _Oak Smoker_ and three _Oak Torches_, the game now generates the village with an _**Acacia Smoker**_ and three _**Acacia Torches**_ (from [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants)). --- ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/996sz.webp) Looking into a Butcher's shop from a Farm of a Desert Village: We can see that instead of an _Oak Smoker_, a regular _Composter_ and an _Oak Torch_, the game now generates the village with a _**Jungle Smoker**_, a _**Jungle Composter**_ (from [More Composter Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-composter-variants)) and a _**Jungle Torch**_ (from [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants)). ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/dn0rh.gif)**]()
